label: War History & Conflict Zones
description:
Military theory (Sun Tzu, Clausewitz, Mao, Boyd), types of warfare (guerrilla, blitzkrieg, hybrid, cyber), laws of war (Geneva Conventions, R2P, ius ad bellum/in bello), landmark historical wars from Persian Wars to Iran-Iraq War, and active/recent conflict zones (Russia-Ukraine, Gaza, Sudan, Sahel, DRC, Myanmar, etc.) with frozen conflicts and territorial disputes.

Import scripts: Wikidata wars and conflicts (SPARQL), UCDP Armed Conflict Dataset API.

Atom IDs: war:type:*, war:tactic:*, war:theory:*, war:law:*, war:conflict:*, conflict:zone:*, conflict:frozen:*, war:ucdp:*
license: Public domain (military terminology) + CC BY (UCDP data)
attribution: Uppsala Conflict Data Program (UCDP/PRIO Armed Conflict Dataset) | Wikidata | SIPRI
